skills.name: smart-web-fetch
skills.description: Smart web content fetcher that retrieves URLs as clean Markdown using Jina Reader, markdown.new, defuddle.md, and a basic fallback path. Use when an agent needs to read a web page, fetch a URL, convert HTML to Markdown, reduce token usage, or extract article-like content from a URL.

examples.request: Read https://example.com and extract the main article text
Use Windows PowerShell to fetch https://example.com as clean Markdown
